name: Grewal RE Group — Austin Real Estate Calculators
description: Free Austin real estate calculators by Shivraj Grewal, Grewal RE Group. Covers affordability, mortgage payments, rent vs buy analysis, and rate buydown scenarios.

itemListElement.name: Austin Home Affordability Calculator
itemListElement.description: Calculate how much home you can afford in Austin, TX. Inputs: annual income, co-borrower income, monthly debts (car, student loans, credit cards), down payment %, interest rate, loan term, DTI limit, property tax rate, insurance, HOA, PMI rate. Outputs: maximum home price (conservative 28% front-end and full back-end DTI), monthly payment breakdown, down payment required.
keywords: how much home can I afford Austin

itemListElement.name: Austin Mortgage Calculator
itemListElement.description: Calculate monthly PITI (principal, interest, taxes, insurance) for an Austin home purchase. Inputs: purchase price, down payment %, interest rate, loan term, property tax rate (default 1.95% for Travis County), homeowners insurance, HOA. Outputs: monthly P&I, taxes, insurance, HOA, total PITI, total interest paid, amortization table.

itemListElement.name: Austin Rent vs Buy Calculator
itemListElement.description: Compare renting vs buying in Austin over a chosen time horizon. Inputs: monthly rent, annual rent increase %, purchase price, down payment %, mortgage rate, comparison years, property tax rate, HOA, maintenance %, home appreciation %. Outputs: total cost renting, total cost buying, equity at end of period, net advantage of buying or renting.

itemListElement.name: Austin Rate Buydown Calculator
itemListElement.description: Calculate the cost and savings of a 2/1 or 3/2/1 temporary rate buydown in Austin. Inputs: purchase price, down payment %, note rate, buydown type. Outputs: year-by-year reduced rate and payment, total buydown subsidy required at closing, monthly savings per year.
